title: Robin’s Lonely Childhood
description: The World Government destroys Ohara, and Robin’s tragedy becomes a direct symbol of its cruelty.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Nico Robin, Professor Clover, Spandam, Nico Olvia, Jaguar D. Saul. The World Government destroys Ohara, and Robin’s tragedy becomes a direct symbol of its cruelty.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Do we have an order yet?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: This seems to be the so-called... "PoneGlyph."

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Shit....!! Hope I ain't too late!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: How'd I not see dis comin'....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Jaguar D. Saul
dialogue.text: I see. So that was it.

dialogue.speaker: Jaguar D. Saul
dialogue.text: Yes, they'll be sentenced to death.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: So we're just waiting for your order.

dialogue.speaker: Spandine
dialogue.text: Stop trying to be diplomatic, GOROUSE!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Dr. Professor Clover of Ohara, huh...?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: The past belongs to all mankind.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Nico Robin, get away from here!

summary: The World Government destroys Ohara, and Robin’s tragedy becomes a direct symbol of its cruelty.
